task_completion.description: Open the dive log application and locate Dive 85 from the September 2011 Hoodsport trip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive log application (e.g., Subsurface) is open, and Dive #85 is selected or visible in the dive list.

task_completion.description: Correct the O2 percentage for Dive 85 to a safe value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The equipment/cylinders tab for Dive 85 shows the O2 percentage modified to 32% or lower (originally 50%).

task_completion.description: Correct the cylinder size for Dive 86 to a plausible value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The equipment/cylinders tab for Dive 86 shows the cylinder size modified to 7.0L or greater (originally 3.0L).

task_completion.description: Correct the cylinder working pressure for Dive 87 to a plausible value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The equipment/cylinders tab for Dive 87 shows the working pressure modified to 150 bar or greater (originally 50 bar).

task_completion.description: Initiate saving the corrected logbook to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Export', or terminal command is visible, preparing to save the file as 'corrected_logbook.xml'.

task_completion.description: Verify the corrected logbook is saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/corrected_logbook.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the file 'corrected_logbook.xml' successfully created in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the dive log GUI application to inspect and modify the dive logs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual dive log software interface (e.g., Subsurface) rather than just running a script to blindly replace text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a raw text editor to manually change the XML values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) showing the raw XML data being manually edited.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the values before saving.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively changing the O2, size, and pressure fields in the application, rather than just copying a pre-made file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires correcting specific gas management errors in Dives 85, 86, and 87. Dive 85 has an unsafe O2 percentage (50%) which must be changed to <= 32%. Dive 86 has an implausibly small cylinder size (3.0L) which must be changed to >= 7.0L. Dive 87 has an implausibly low working pressure (50 bar) which must be changed to >= 150 bar. The final file must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/corrected_logbook.xml.
